mrp_clause_text:
September 2023
Consumption 20.58 KSh/kWh
FCC 4.16
FERFA 1.38
IA 0.23
WARMA 0.01
ERC 0.08
REP 1.03
VAT 3.96
Total 31.43
notes: This appears to be a Kenyan utility bill breakdown showing various tariff components. The MRP calculation includes all charges except VAT. Components include: Consumption (base energy charge), FCC (Fuel Cost Charge), FERFA (Foreign Exchange Rate Fluctuation Adjustment), IA (Inflation Adjustment), WARMA (Water Resources Management Authority levy), ERC (Energy and Petroleum Regulatory Authority levy), and REP (Rural Electrification Programme levy).
